description_long: This is a round, single-layer cake with a white creamy exterior and a topping of closely packed red berries, likely strawberries or raspberries, arranged in a neat pattern. The cake has a soft, fluffy texture visible from a large wedge that has been cut out, revealing a light yellow sponge interior and a layer of cream or custard. The surface is glossy from the fruit, contrasting with the matte, slightly uneven finish of the cream. There are no visible candles or elaborate decorations, giving it a rustic, homemade appearance. The cake sits directly on a flat surface without any visible plate or tray. Its size and appearance suggest it is suitable for a small gathering or as a dessert in a café or bakery.
description: A round, single-layer cake with white cream frosting and a topping of red berries, featuring a cut-out wedge that reveals a soft sponge interior. The cake has a rustic, homemade look and sits directly on a flat surface.
description_view_0: The cake is seen from above, highlighting the red berry topping and the smooth, white cream sides.
description_view_1: This angle shows the side and a partial view of the cut-out wedge, exposing the inner sponge and cream layers.
description_view_2: The cut-out wedge is fully visible, clearly displaying the cake's interior structure and creamy filling.
description_view_3: The cake is viewed from the opposite side of the cut, showing mostly the cream-covered exterior and berry topping.
